js.home: const category=text(env.get("category",""));const page=Number(env.get("page",1));if(category){const list=await apiGet(`/categories/${category}/videos`,{page,limit:PAGE_SIZE,sort:"-vod_time"});return(list.videos||[]).map(item=>movieOf(item))}const blocks=await Promise.all(HOME_CATEGORY_IDS.map(async categoryId=>{const data=await apiGet(`/categories/${categoryId}/videos`,{page:1,limit:12,sort:"-vod_time"});const titles={"1":"\u6700\u65B0\u7535\u5F71","2":"\u6700\u65B0\u5267\u96C6","3":"\u6700\u65B0\u7EFC\u827A","4":"\u6700\u65B0\u52A8\u6F2B"};return{type:"card",title:titles[categoryId]||`分类 ${categoryId}`,videos:(data.videos||[]).map(item=>movieOf(item)),extra:{categoryId}}}));return{type:"complex",data:blocks.filter(block=>(block.videos||[]).length>0)}
js.detail: const movieId=text(env.get("movieId",""));const detail=await apiGet(`/videos/${movieId}`);const routes=Array.isArray(detail.available_routes)?detail.available_routes.map(item=>text(item)).filter(Boolean):[];const episodes=Array.isArray(detail.episodes)?detail.episodes:[];let playlist=routes.map(route=>({title:route,videos:episodes.filter(episode=>text(episode.route)===route).map(episode=>({text:text(episode.name)||`第${text(episode.episode)}集`,url:normalizeUrl(episode.url)})).filter(episode=>Boolean(episode.url))})).filter(group=>group.videos.length>0);if(playlist.length===0){const singleUrl=normalizeUrl(detail.vod_play_url);if(singleUrl){playlist=[{title:"\u9ED8\u8BA4\u7EBF\u8DEF",videos:[{text:"\u7ACB\u5373\u64AD\u653E",url:singleUrl}]}]}}const descParts=[text(detail.type_name),text(detail.vod_year),text(detail.vod_area),text(detail.vod_lang),splitValues(detail.vod_class).join(" / "),splitValues(detail.vod_director).length?`导演: ${splitValues(detail.vod_director).join(" / ")}`:"",splitValues(detail.vod_actor).length?`主演: ${splitValues(detail.vod_actor).slice(0,8).join(" / ")}`:"",text(detail.vod_content)||text(detail.vod_blurb)].filter(Boolean);return{id:text(detail.vod_id)||movieId,title:text(detail.vod_name)||"Untitled",cover:coverOf(detail),remark:text(detail.vod_remarks),desc:descParts.join("\n"),playlist}
